decision: backend selection via new pipeline._build_store(config) helper; both UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL+TOKEN non-empty => UpstashStateStore, else JsonFileStateStore
reasoning: mirrors existing _build_cache/_build_etag_cache env-driven pattern (INT-V3-003-002); unit-testable; empty-string env = absent

decision: adapter implements load/save (Protocol) PLUS is_seen(HGET)/mark_seen(per-item HSETNX); key osspulse:state:{repo}, field {item_type}:{item_id}, value first_seen_at Z
reasoning: pipeline calls is_seen/mark_seen on concrete adapter not Protocol (R-1); HSETNX = atomic set-if-absent enforces write-once first_seen_at without RMW race (AC-003)

decision: add SeenTracker(Protocol) to ports.py (is_seen/mark_seen); widen _partition_new/_collect_all state: hints to it; StateStore Protocol UNCHANGED
reasoning: R-2 type hints pinned to concrete JsonFileStateStore; SeenTracker documents the real pipeline contract via structural typing without changing StateStore (honors scope constraint 5, AC-008)
rejected: add is_seen/mark_seen to StateStore Protocol (violates AC-008 / scope 5)

decision: runtime Upstash error => raise StateError (exit 1), never silent fallback; fallback is construction-time-on-env-absence ONLY; error message composed from exception-type/status, never str(exc)
reasoning: state is idempotency source of truth (AC-007, R-4); silent degrade to empty local file on fresh CI runner re-renders/loses seen-state; INVERTS best-effort cache null-object behavior; str(exc) could leak tokened URL (R-3)
rejected: silent fallback to JsonFileStateStore at runtime (loses idempotency)
return empty state on error (re-renders everything)

decision: lazy import of UpstashStateStore inside _build_store if-branch (not at module top)
reasoning: avoids requiring upstash-redis package when env vars absent; mirrors _build_etag_cache pattern for optional imports
rejected: top-level import (would require package even when Upstash not configured)

decision: scan loop with cursor pagination in load() instead of single keys() call
reasoning: correct for large Upstash databases; scan is the idiomatic Redis iteration approach; single keys() blocks and fails for large keyspaces
rejected: single keys() call (blocks + fails for large keyspaces)

decision: error message pattern: f'Upstash {operation} failed: {type(exc).__name__}' — never str(exc)
reasoning: type(exc).__name__ gives enough context without embedding tokened URL; satisfies R-3/AC-006 secret non-disclosure
rejected: str(exc) (may embed the tokened REST URL per design gotchas)

decision: GO — 0 bugs found; all 8 ACs verified; 658/658 tests pass; 96.17% coverage; HSETNX confirmed in mark_seen; StateError propagation confirmed at all 4 call sites; no str(exc) in error messages
reasoning: Independent code review + test run confirms: is_seen→HGET, mark_seen→HSETNX (not HSET), runtime errors→StateError (chained, not swallowed), error messages→type(exc).__name__ only (no URL/token), backend selection truthiness check covers empty-string edge cases, StateStore Protocol unchanged (no is_seen/mark_seen), load/save present on UpstashStateStore
